areas.label: Shared infrastructure
areas.notes: Initial config, seed, dataset split, metrics, and export scaffold implemented; trainer, evaluator, vocab, and visualization remain

areas.label: Q1 Text Classification
areas.notes: TF-IDF baselines and the BiLSTM path are implemented; DistilBERT remains the next unclaimed Q1 slice

areas.label: Q2 Named Entity Recognition
areas.notes: CRF baseline slice claimed; CoNLL-2003 data flow and initial training pipeline in progress

areas.label: Evaluation and analysis
areas.notes: Q1 confusion-matrix and evaluation artifact export in progress; keep model-training ownership unchanged

areas.label: Report preparation
areas.notes: LaTeX report structure and results write-up

areas.label: Project state sync
areas.notes: docs/agents state synced with the implemented Q1 baseline and scaffold

priorities: Extend the shared scaffold only where Q1 needs it next.
Implement BiLSTM and DistilBERT on top of the verified Q1 classical baselines.
Freeze broader evaluation and export conventions before scaling Q2-Q5.

pending_decisions: Whether optional GPT-2 fine-tuning will be included in Q5.
next_recommended_actions: Claim the DistilBERT Q1 slice as the next separate owner and reuse the verified Q1 export flow
Run a larger-budget BiLSTM experiment once the Q1 neural experiment budget is finalized
Extend shared evaluation/export only if DistilBERT reveals a concrete gap

entries.outcome: JSON state and CLI now generate the board, handoff view, and per-agent log
entries.next: Use the CLI as agents pick up Q1-Q5 work

entries.outcome: docs/agents now reflects the implemented shared scaffold and Q1 classical baseline progress
entries.next: Claim the next Q1 neural-model slice before editing implementation files

entries.outcome: Added an opt-in BiLSTM path, fixed CLI override handling, and validated the end-to-end export flow on a small IMDb run
entries.next: Claim DistilBERT as a separate Q1 slice and reuse the same metrics and prediction export path

agents.name: copilot-ops
agents.scope: Set up agent coordination workspace and CLI

completed: Added status.json as the single source of truth
Implemented scripts/agent_status.py for sync and updates
Updated documentation to describe the tracking workflow

decisions: Used JSON plus generated markdown instead of freeform notes
next_actions: Use set-area when an agent claims a project area
Use append-agent during active work to keep logs incremental

agents.name: copilot-tracker
agents.scope: Sync docs/agents status with the implemented Q1 baseline and shared scaffold

started: Reviewed docs/agents protocol and current board
completed: Claimed a tracking-only area to avoid taking ownership of implementation scopes
Updated area statuses to match the implemented shared scaffold and Q1 classical baseline slice
Refreshed handoff recommendations to point at the next narrow Q1 slices

decisions: Kept this pass limited to docs/agents state and did not claim any implementation area
next_actions: Claim the next implementation slice before editing non-tracking files
If Q1 continues, split BiLSTM and DistilBERT into separate claims

agents.name: copilot-q1-bilstm
agents.scope: Implement and validate the Q1 BiLSTM slice on top of the existing IMDb pipeline

started: Reviewed board, protocol, and current Q1 classical pipeline
completed: Implemented a self-contained BiLSTM wrapper with fit, predict, and confidence interfaces
Integrated BiLSTM into the existing Q1 training and export flow
Added PyTorch dependency support and runtime environment reporting
Fixed CLI override accumulation so repeated --override flags work as documented
Validated the BiLSTM path with a small end-to-end IMDb run and confirmed metrics plus prediction exports

decisions: Kept the BiLSTM config opt-in so the default Q1 run remains lightweight while the neural slice stabilizes
next_actions: Claim the DistilBERT Q1 slice separately and plug it into the same evaluation/export flow

agents.name: copilot-q2-crf
agents.scope: Implement the Q2 CRF baseline slice on top of the shared scaffold

started: Reviewed board, protocol, and Q2 NER design doc

next_actions: Inspect shared and Q1 code patterns, then scaffold CoNLL data loading and CRF baseline

agents.scope: Implement shared Q1 evaluation artifacts and exports without changing active model-training ownership

in_progress: Adding confusion-matrix and richer evaluation artifact support for Q1
